articles.title: Korea Benchmark Bond Yield Tops 4% as Rate-Hike Bets Grow
articles.summary: South Korea’s 10-year bond yield rose above 4% for the first time since late 2023, as an oil shock tied to the Iran conflict leads traders to expect bigger interest rate hikes.

articles.title: Japan’s 20-Year Bond Yield Rises to 1997 High on Inflation Woes
articles.summary: Japan’s 20-year government bond yield breached its January peak to touch the highest level since 1997, as elevated energy prices add to inflation pressure.

articles.title: Philippine Bonds Face Extended Slump on Large Rate Hike Bets
articles.summary: Philippine sovereign bonds are extending a selloff as traders price in the prospect of a 50-basis-point rate hike, the largest since 2023.

articles.title: BOJ’s Policy Rate Likely to Reach 2% by End of 2027, OECD Says
